mapper.sql: id, publish_user_id, dept_id, file_url, content, topics, location, is_public, like_count, comment_count, del_flag
mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.publish_user_id, p.dept_id, p.file_url, p.content, p.topics, p.location, p.is_public, p.like_count, p.comment_count, p.create_time, IF(l.id IS NULL, 0, 1) AS is_like, su.user_name, su.avatar FROM dept_circle_post p LEFT JOIN dept_circle_like l ON p.id = l.post_id AND l.user_id = #{ro.currentUserId} AND l.del_flag = '0' LEFT JOIN sys_user su on su.user_id = p.publish_user_id WHERE p.del_flag = '0' AND p.dept_id = #{ro.deptId} ORDER BY p.create_time DESC

SELECT p.id, p.publish_user_id, p.dept_id, p.file_url, p.content, p.topics, p.location, p.is_public, p.like_count, p.comment_count, p.create_time, IF(l.id IS NULL, 0, 1) AS is_like FROM dept_circle_post p LEFT JOIN dept_circle_like l ON p.id = l.post_id AND l.user_id = #{userId} AND l.del_flag = '0' WHERE p.del_flag = '0' AND p.dept_id = #{deptId} ORDER BY p.create_time DESC
